## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` reports no files
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] No tokens, passwords, or internal URLs are included in the diff
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or flags changed
